# viettelidc_vks_schedulers (Data Source)

Data source to list all VKS backup schedulers of a host.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (Number) ID of the host.

### Optional

- `plan_type` (String) Plan type, default is 'k8s'.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `schedulers` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--schedulers))

<a id="nestedatt--schedulers"></a>
### Nested Schema for `schedulers`

Read-Only:

- `cycle` (Number)
- `finish_time` (String)
- `id` (String)
- `name` (String)
- `quantity` (Number)
- `start_time` (String)
- `status` (String)
- `unit` (String)
